scripts.test: pnpm build && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/schema-contract.test.mjs tests/versions-endpoint.test.mjs tests/diff-engine.test.mjs tests/versions-worker-diff.test.mjs tests/search-indexing.test.mjs tests/try-it-out-proxy.test.mjs tests/webhook-dispatcher.test.mjs tests/api-token-auth.test.mjs tests/github-action.test.mjs tests/frontend-doc-portal.test.mjs tests/frontend-auth.test.mjs tests/cli-deploy.test.mjs
scripts.build: DATABASE_URL=postgresql://bumd:bumd@localhost:5432/bumd prisma validate --schema apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma && tsc -b && pnpm --filter @bumd/frontend build
